rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Calling createNotificationService() at request time creates a fresh in-memory store per request — data written in one handler is invisible to another.","scope":"src/services/notificationService.ts:64-66"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Use a singleton service instance (top-level `let service`) initialized once, not a factory called per request, when the store is in-memory.","scope":"src/services/notificationService.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"TDD ordering: write tests first per area, then implementation, per step in the plan.","scope":"plan.md step ordering"}]}
